Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Feb-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Young S. Lee, Esq. appeared for petitioners Daniel L. Mitchell and Brenda L. Mitchell, the guardian ad litems for the minor Kenneth Holladay. Neither petitioners nor the minor were present at today's hearing.
Order waiving the appearance of petitioners at today's hearing was filed on January 26, 2009.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $37,118.79.
Attorney's Fees - $9,279.46.
Costs - 94 cents.

A net balance of $27,838.39 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wachovia Bank, Olympic and Burns Valley Financial Center Branch, 14918 Olympic Drive, Clear Lake, CA 95422. No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Additionally, the Court Orders that future settlements from other bankruptcy trusts in this action, as may be recommended by counsel may be accepted, 33.3% share of costs and attorneys' fees of 25% deducted, and the net proceeds deposited into a blocked, interest-bearing, federally insured account at Wachovia Bank, Olympic and Burns Valley Financial Center Branch, 14918 Olympic Drive, Clear Lake, CA 95422, in the name of Brenda Mitchell, as Trustee for Kenneth Holladay, a minor, not to be withdrawn without a Court Order first being obtained or until said minor reaches his majority on April 17, 2009, without the necessity of further petition being made to this Court.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
